What People Say

Hear from our community members about their experience

"Fix My City made reporting the pothole near my house incredibly easy. Fixed within a week!"

Rajesh Kumar

Resident, Mumbai

"The voice reporting feature is fantastic. Perfect for those who prefer speaking over typing."

Priya Singh

Community Leader, Delhi

"The AI categorization saves our team hours. Issues are prioritized automatically."
